featureSections.title: Comprehensive Electrical Services

featureSections.cardBody: Typical customers save 30-50% on monthly electricity costs.

cta.headline: Ready to Power Up?

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, Supreme Electric and Solar offers a full range of electrical and solar services for Dallas homes and businesses. Our licensed technicians use the latest tools and techniques to ensure safety, efficiency, and lasting results.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable diagnosis and repair for any electrical issue.
services.longDescription: Flickering lights, dead outlets, or frequent breaker trips? Our experienced electricians quickly identify the root cause and provide lasting repairs. We handle everything from faulty wiring to malfunctioning switches, ensuring your home stays safe and powered.
benefits: Same-day service available for urgent issues
Thorough diagnostics to prevent recurring problems
All repairs backed by a workmanship warranty

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: We inspect the issue using advanced tools to pinpoint the problem.

process.title: Plan
process.description: We explain the repair needed and provide a clear, upfront quote.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Our technician completes the repair efficiently, then tests everything.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and typically arrive within 1-2 hours for urgent calls.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, all repairs come with a 90-day workmanship guarantee for your peace of mind.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Installations
services.shortDescription: Modernize your electrical panel for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: An outdated electrical panel can be a fire hazard and limit your home's power. We upgrade panels to 200 amps or more, accommodating modern appliances, home additions, or solar systems. Our work meets all local codes and includes a thorough safety inspection.
benefits: Increased capacity for new appliances or renovations
Enhanced safety with arc-fault breakers and surge protection
Improved home value and insurance compliance

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We handle all necessary permits and coordinate with the utility.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install the new panel, test circuits, and clean up thoroughly.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most upgrades are completed in 4-8 hours, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, and we handle all permitting and inspections on your behalf.

services.title: Solar Panel Installation
services.shortDescription: Custom solar solutions to lower your energy bills.
services.longDescription: Harness the power of the Texas sun with professionally designed solar systems. We handle the entire process — from energy audit and design to installation and grid connection. Our panels are high-efficiency and come with industry-leading warranties.
benefits: Significant reduction in monthly electricity costs
Eligibility for federal tax credits and local incentives

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We review your energy usage and roof suitability.

process.title: Design
process.description: Our engineers create a custom solar layout for maximum production.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional installation with minimal disruption, followed by inspection.

faqs.question: How much can I save with solar?
faqs.answer: Typical customers save 30-50% on electricity bills, with payback periods of 5-8 years.

faqs.question: What warranties come with solar panels?
faqs.answer: We offer a 25-year performance warranty and a 10-year workmanship warranty.

services.title: Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting for any space.
services.longDescription: Transform your home or business with custom lighting design. From indoor ambiance to outdoor security and landscape lighting, we install LED fixtures, dimmers, and smart controls that enhance aesthetics and reduce energy use. Our designs are tailored to your style and needs.
benefits: Energy-efficient LED options that last 50,000+ hours
Smart lighting integration with voice or app control
Enhanced curb appeal and security with outdoor lighting

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and lighting goals.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a lighting plan with fixture selections and layout.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional installation with careful attention to detail and cleanup.

faqs.question: Can you install smart lighting in an older home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can retrofit smart switches, dimmers, and bulbs without major rewiring.

faqs.question: Do you offer landscape lighting?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — we design and install low-voltage landscape lighting for gardens, pathways, and patios.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electrical & Solar Partner
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and innovative electrical and solar solutions that power the lives of our neighbors in Dallas.
story: Supreme Electric and Solar was founded with a simple mission: deliver top-quality electrical work with honesty and transparency. Starting as a small two-person operation, we quickly earned a reputation for reliability and craftsmanship. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service electrical contractor serving hundreds of homes and businesses across Dallas.

Our team of licensed electricians and solar specialists undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of industry advancements. We believe in building lasting relationships through exceptional service, upfront communication, and a commitment to safety. Whether it's a minor repair or a major solar installation, we treat every project with the same dedication.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, with transparent pricing and honest advice.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every job is completed to the highest standard, using premium materials.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: We prioritize the safety of our clients and our team above all else.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We embrace the latest technology to deliver efficient, modern solutions.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Supreme Electric and Solar
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form below for a free, no-obligation estimate.
